modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Laptop display turns off while typing on Lenovo device.

full_description_text: The user reported that their laptop display unexpectedly powers off when they attempt to type. This issue occurs during regular use, leading to interruptions in their workflow. The problem seems to arise specifically with their Lenovo laptop, and it is unclear if any external devices, such as an Apple Watch, are contributing to the situation.
short_description: Laptop display turns off while typing on Lenovo device.
description: The user reported that their laptop display unexpectedly powers off when they attempt to type. This issue occurs during regular use, leading to interruptions in their workflow.
